---
title: "Lord Fitzroy Somerset, 1st Lord Raglan"
---

## Lord Fitzroy Somerset, 1st Lord Raglan

**Dates:** (1788-1855)

### Description

army officer

### Biography

He commanded the British troops in the Crimea.

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897
- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from Feb 19  [1894]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
